channel.title: Awesome Search KG
channel.description: Last 10 notes on Awesome Search KG

item.title: Doug Turnbull
item.description: Doug Turnbull Co-founder of OpenSource Connections (OSC); co-author of Relevant Search (O’Reilly).

item.title: Query Relaxation - a rewriting technique between search and recommendations
item.description: Query Relaxation - a rewriting technique between search and recommendations 📺 Watch: www.youtube.com/watch Talk by Rene Kriegler (introduced by Charlie Hull, OpenSource Connections), 2019.

item.title: Approximate Nearest Neighbor Search
item.description: Approximate Nearest Neighbor Search (ANN) Approximate Nearest Neighbor (ANN) search finds vectors close to a query vector without comparing against every vector in the dataset.

item.title: HNSW
item.description: HNSW — Hierarchical Navigable Small World Graph-based approximate nearest neighbor (ANN) index. Malkov & Yashunin, 2018 (arXiv:1603.09320).

item.title: IVF
item.description: IVF — Inverted File Index (Vectors) Cluster-based approximate nearest neighbor (ANN) index.

item.title: LSH
item.description: LSH — Locality Sensitive Hashing Locality Sensitive Hashing is an ANN method that hashes vectors so that similar vectors collide into the same bucket.

item.title: History
item.description: Awesome Search — Note History Chronological log of notes added to this knowledge graph. Newest first.

item.title: James Briggs
item.description: James Briggs Background James Briggs is a technical writer and developer advocate at Pinecone, known for practical, implementation-focused articles on vector search, SPLADE, and metadata filtering.

item.title: FAISS
item.description: FAISS FAISS (Facebook AI Similarity Search) is Meta’s open-source C++/Python library for efficient similarity search and clustering of dense vectors.

item.title: global_toc
item.description: Global Table of Contents A map of every note in the vault organized by category and theme.
